areas.name: UI URL State and API Client

entries.interface: dirbase CLI arguments, dirbase.conf, startup summary

asserts: config parser handles comments, quotes, and escapes
CLI values override config values
server starts from dirbase.conf
startup output includes browser URL and source metadata

parameters.name: cli/config source
missing_values: malformed config file integration failure mode

cases: config parser rejects invalid tokenization through unit coverage
missing_cases: end-to-end malformed config file process exit assertion

entries.notes: This row tracks the public CLI behavior rather than every private CLI helper.

entries.interface: auth, CORS, logging, metrics, XML format, health endpoints

asserts: protected routes reject missing tokens and accept bearer tokens
CORS preflight and response headers are emitted
Prometheus counters include requests and errors
JSON response bodies can be converted to XML

parameters.name: request headers
missing_values: multiple Accept values with XML quality factors

parameters.name: server config
missing_values: custom body limit rejection row should stay visible

cases: XML scalar and invalid XML names
missing_cases: body limit rejection documented in matrix but needs direct coverage if absent

entries.notes: Route-level middleware behavior is covered through integration tests because the public contract is HTTP-visible.

asserts: string ids resolve
missing item returns 404
invalid resource name is rejected
overview metadata describes resources
browser root renders HTML overview

parameters.name: id
missing_values: boolean id route behavior if intentionally supported

entries.interface: REST collection filters, sorting, pagination, embeds

asserts: query parser recognizes pagination, sort, embeds, and filters
operator matrix covers nested, missing, null, and string comparisons
HTTP query path applies operators, nested fields, sort, and pagination
embed replaces foreign key values with related rows

parameters.name: pagination
missing_values: configured max-per-page rejection if only route-level coverage exists

cases: unknown underscore suffix treated as field
missing_cases: unknown embed relation and missing target-row response should be explicit

entries.notes: Dense operator behavior is best maintained as unit matrix tests plus a smaller HTTP integration set.

asserts: CRUD routes persist changes end to end
parallel POST requests preserve all rows
parallel update/delete leaves valid JSON
PATCH merges fields and keeps path primary key
object-resource PATCH merges top-level fields

parameters.name: payload
missing_values: schema constraint rejection at mutation-service level

missing_cases: declared-schema validation failure per mutation operation

entries.notes: The initial report intentionally marks schema-validation rejection as a visible gap for follow-up.

asserts: folder resource reads JSON
file-mode write preserves unrelated top-level resources
parallel file-mode writes preserve every resource update
interrupted temp file residue does not corrupt writes
unique and primary key constraints are enforced

cases: resource write lock behavior through mutation tests

entries.interface: schema.json, schema.xsd, schema.dbml, inferred schema, effective schema

asserts: DBML parser handles tables and references
JSON schema parser handles declared schema
XSD parser handles tables, keys, and keyrefs
schema auto-discovery precedence prefers schema.json
suppressed inferred relations survive persistence and reload

parameters.name: schema features
missing_values: declared many-to-many relation endpoint case if not explicit

entries.notes: Schema persistence route behavior is tracked in endpoint tests; parser and validator detail remains in module tests.

asserts: GET /graphql serves GraphiQL to browsers
POST /graphql returns collections and item lookups
query fields support filter, sort, and pagination
many-to-many relation fields resolve target rows
invalid GraphQL names are normalized

parameters.name: request shape
missing_values: malformed JSON body if not covered by Axum extractor tests

cases: missing resource schema build errors through helper conversion
missing_cases: explicit invalid variables/operator request if absent

cases: schema cache invalidation is covered through app-state tests
missing_cases: parallel GraphQL schema build/query stress case

entries.notes: Most private GraphQL builder helpers are intentionally covered through dynamic schema behavior.

asserts: SQL endpoint handles projection, where, order, limit, and offset
schema-backed INNER JOIN materializes rows
unsupported syntax and invalid fields return errors
SQL export renders dialect-specific output

parameters.name: query
missing_values: quoted identifiers if intentionally unsupported

cases: query length or scan/selected row guard
missing_cases: explicit malformed SQL literal edge cases

entries.interface: resource watcher plus GET /events SSE stream

asserts: read-only access events are ignored
temporary files do not trigger resource refresh
data changes trigger processing
SSE stream emits server events

parameters.name: event path
missing_values: file-mode db.json watcher path if not integrated

parameters.name: event kind
missing_values: rename if platform-specific behavior matters

entries.symbol: App state, metrics, health, errors, relations
entries.interface: shared application state and support types

asserts: schema store returns effective merged schema
metrics counters render in Prometheus format
health state tracks ready flag and last error
relation lookup behavior resolves embedded rows through the public REST interface

parameters.name: relation key
missing_values: boolean if intentionally supported

missing_cases: AppError JSON body shape direct unit coverage if only integration-covered

cases: resource lock ordering is exercised by mutation concurrency tests
missing_cases: direct lock ordering test for read_locks_for_resources

entries.interface: overview URL state, REST request paths, API client functions

covered_by.test: hydrates state from the browser query string
asserts: query string hydrates overview state

covered_by.test: serializes filters into REST query params
asserts: filters serialize into server query params

covered_by.test: throws for failed overview and schema requests
asserts: API client surfaces failed response text

covered_by.test: orders primary key columns first and merges schema, field, and sampled row names
asserts: table helper column ordering is stable

parameters.name: URL values
missing_values: unknown mode/view telemetry if needed

parameters.name: API response
missing_values: network rejection path if not covered by fetch stubs

entries.interface: resource sidebar, explorer header, query summary, data explorer

covered_by.test: renders loading placeholders and empty search results
asserts: sidebar renders loading and empty states

covered_by.test: updates filters, embeds, visibility, and row selection
asserts: explorer controls update query and selection state
non-table rendering modes work
toasts, skeletons, highlighting, cell values, resource grouping

parameters.name: user action
missing_values: keyboard-only row activation if not covered

entries.interface: mutation dialog, inspector requests, mutation planning

covered_by.test: uses PATCH with only changed keys for row edits by default
asserts: mutation planner builds minimal PATCH payloads

covered_by.test: switches to PUT for full object replacement after explicit selection
asserts: mutation planner supports full replacement mode

covered_by.test: builds and submits PATCH requests for changed rows
asserts: mutation dialog submits PATCH plans

covered_by.test: requires confirmation for deletes and surfaces submit failures
asserts: delete confirmation and failed submission states are visible

covered_by.test: surfaces invalid JSON and disables submission
asserts: invalid JSON disables mutation submission

entries.interface: schema editor, schema graph, details panels, JSON drawer

covered_by.test: merges inferred schema with declared overrides and suppressions
asserts: workspace merges inferred and declared schema state

covered_by.test: validates enum and unique constraint declarations
asserts: schema draft validation catches invalid constraints

covered_by.test: derives strict junction kinds and many-to-many relations client-side
asserts: client graph derives junction and many-to-many metadata

covered_by.test: renders only handles that can actually participate in a connection
asserts: schema canvas renders valid connection handles

covered_by.test: loads dedicated schema mode and stages structured edits before save
asserts: schema workspace supports staged edits before saving

parameters.name: schema edits
missing_values: every visual details-panel input edge case

missing_cases: visual details-panel parsing edge cases for every field type

covered_by.test: keeps one EventSource instance alive across transient errors
asserts: transient errors do not recreate the stream unnecessarily

covered_by.test: pauses after repeated errors and opens a fresh stream on retry
asserts: repeated errors pause live updates and retry creates a fresh stream

covered_by.test: invalidates overview queries after server events and pauses event storms
asserts: resource/schema events invalidate queries and event storms are paused
overview-related query keys are invalidated together

parameters.name: event
missing_values: malformed event data if parser becomes explicit

cases: event storms are rate-limited by pause behavior

entries.interface: Playwright browser flows against a running dirbase server

covered_by.test: supports first-load discovery, filter chips, and relation drill-down in both directions
asserts: overview discovery, filters, and relation drilldown work in browser

covered_by.test: supports mobile drawers and inspector sheet without losing explorer state
asserts: mobile drawer interactions preserve state

covered_by.test: supports object raw mode and invalid mutation feedback
asserts: object raw mode and invalid mutation feedback are visible

covered_by.test: supports create, edit, delete, infer, and save workflows
asserts: core write and schema workflows work end to end

parameters.name: viewport/workflow
missing_values: cross-browser variants beyond configured Playwright browser

missing_cases: network failure and server restart browser recovery

entries.notes: The e2e row intentionally tracks browser workflows rather than individual helper functions.

entries.interface: package binary path helpers and runDirbase

covered_by.test: builds platform keys from platform and architecture
asserts: platform and architecture are combined into binary key

covered_by.test: selects executable names for Unix and Windows platforms
asserts: Windows gets .exe and Unix does not

covered_by.test: rejects clearly when the platform binary is missing
asserts: missing binary returns a clear rejection

covered_by.test: spawns the resolved binary and resolves with its exit code
asserts: spawn close code is returned

covered_by.test: rejects when the spawned process emits an error
asserts: spawn error rejects runDirbase

parameters.name: platform
missing_values: unsupported arch naming policy beyond helper construction

parameters.name: spawn lifecycle
missing_values: close with null code

missing_cases: CLI wrapper process.exit behavior without spawning real binary

entries.notes: The CLI wrapper is intentionally listed as a small remaining gap because it calls process.exit immediately.

out_of_scope.reason: Benchmark coverage is tracked separately in BENCHMARKS.md.
Generated overview assets are covered through source UI tests and rebuild checks.
